context: Evaluates the agent's ability to run the docmd build and verify the output is correct.

checklist.name: Exit code verified
checklist.description: Agent checks that the build exited with code 0

checklist.name: Page count reported
checklist.description: Agent reports the number of generated pages from the build output

checklist.name: Output directory exists
checklist.description: Agent verifies site/ directory was created

checklist.name: Failure remediation
checklist.description: On build failure, agent never omits actionable remediation based on error output
